name: ciq_financial_search
description: Search for financial reports, earnings calls, and M&A documents on S&P Capital IQ and download the top results as PDF/Excel files. Handles Okta SSO authentication automatically.

company.description: The company name or keyword to search on Capital IQ (e.g., 'Nvidia', 'Apple')

usage_examples: 在 CIQ 上搜索英伟达的财报，下载前 5 份
Search for Apple on Capital IQ and download top 10 results
帮我在 Capital IQ 下载 Microsoft 最新研报

CIQ_DEBUG.description: Set to 'true' to enable visible browser during login for MFA debugging (default: false)
